A

AbstractReferendumEvaluator<T> - Class in com.oop.referendumserver.services.evaluators
An abstract class representing a generic evaluator for referendums Provides methods for evaluating the outcome of a referendum based on collected referendum forms Implements the template method pattern, where the evaluate method serves as a template for the algorithm and delegates the specifics to subclasses via abstract methods
AbstractReferendumEvaluator() - Constructor for class com.oop.referendumserver.services.evaluators.AbstractReferendumEvaluator
 
AbstractReferendumEvaluator.InternalResult - Class in com.oop.referendumserver.services.evaluators
 
AbstractViewController - Class in com.oop.referendumserver.view.controllers
Abstract base class for JavaFX view controllers.
AbstractViewController() - Constructor for class com.oop.referendumserver.view.controllers.AbstractViewController
 
addLikedReferendumToUser(AppUser, Referendum) - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.services.UserService
Adds a liked referendum to the specified user
addVotedReferendumToUser(AppUser, Referendum) - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.services.UserService
Adds a voted referendum to the specified user
Admin - Class in com.oop.referendumserver.db.model
Represents an administrator in the AppUser system.
Admin() - Constructor for class com.oop.referendumserver.db.model.Admin
 
adminEvaluates() - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.services.EvaluateAspect
Pointcut expression that defines the execution of the evaluate method within the ReferendumService class, indicating the evaluation of referendums by administrators.
adminScene - Variable in class com.oop.referendumserver.view.controllers.RegionSelectController
 
Application - Class in com.oop.referendumserver
The main entry point for running the Referendum Server application.
Application() - Constructor for class com.oop.referendumserver.Application
 
AppUser - Class in com.oop.referendumserver.db.model
Represents a main branch of AppUser hierarchy
AppUser() - Constructor for class com.oop.referendumserver.db.model.AppUser
 
areAllAnswersYes() - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.db.model.ReferendumForm
This Function checks if all answers in the referendum form are "Yes"
